ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading activity */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the trading occurred */,
  "ttl_trd_qty" INTEGER /* Total trade quantity for the day */,
  "no_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed for the day */,
  "qty_per_trade" REAL /* Average quantity per trade */,
  "deliv_qty" INTEGER /* Delivery quantity for the day */,
  "market_segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market segment */,
  "trading_session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_trading_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("trading_session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_market_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_segment_id") REFERENCES market_segments ("market_segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company issuing the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Information Technology, Financial Services) */,
  "market_segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the trader's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traders_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader conducting the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading session (e.g., live, simulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading metric record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading activity */,
  "total_qty" INTEGER /* Total trade quantity */,
  "avg_qty" REAL /* Average trade quantity */,
  "max_qty" INTEGER /* Maximum trade quantity */,
  "min_qty" INTEGER /* Minimum trade quantity */,
  "delivery_ratio" REAL /* Delivery ratio (delivery quantity / total quantity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_metrics_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade log */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading record */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader executing the trade */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the trade */,
  "trade_qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the trade */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trading_data ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_logs" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery log */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading record */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader executing the delivery */,
  "delivery_time" TEXT /* Time of the delivery */,
  "delivery_qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trading_data ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_logs_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_segments" (
  "market_segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market segment */,
  "market_segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the market segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view_data) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Details of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Generated report data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
